statement: In every magma, Equation 3241 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * z) * u`) implies Equation 334 (`x * y = y * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0215
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) z) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op y (op x z))
